## IUseShellChocolateSelectionOptions.productionSelectedId property

Production-selected chocolate ID (for this run, not recipe edit). If provided, this overrides preferredId for display but doesn't modify the draft.

**Signature:**

```typescript
productionSelectedId?: string;
```
